CREATE TABLE salaries(    `team` String,    `player` String,    `salary` UInt32,    `position` String) Engine = Memory;

INSERT INTO salaries FORMAT VALUES ('Port Elizabeth Barbarians', 'Gary Chen', 195000, 'F'), ('New Coreystad Archdukes', 'Charles Juarez', 190000, 'F'), ('Port Elizabeth Barbarians', 'Michael Stanley', 150000, 'D'), ('New Coreystad Archdukes', 'Scott Harrison', 150000, 'D'), ('Port Elizabeth Barbarians', 'Robert George', 195000, 'M'), ('South Hampton Seagulls', 'Douglas Benson', 150000, 'M'), ('South Hampton Seagulls', 'James Henderson', 140000, 'M');
SELECT player, salary, rank() OVER (PARTITION BY position ORDER BY salary DESC) AS rank FROM salaries;
CREATE TABLE teams(    `team` String,    `location` String) Engine = Memory;
INSERT INTO teams FORMAT VALUES ('Port Elizabeth Barbarians', 'Port Elizabeth'), ('New Coreystad Archdukes', 'Coreystad'), ('South Hampton Seagulls', 'South Hampton');
SELECT t.player, t.salary, rank() OVER (PARTITION BY t.team ORDER BY t.salary DESC) AS rank FROM (SELECT player, salary, team FROM salaries) AS t;
CREATE TABLE games(    `game_id` UInt32,    `team` String,    `points` UInt32) Engine = Memory;
INSERT INTO games FORMAT VALUES (1, 'Port Elizabeth Barbarians', 100), (2, 'New Coreystad Archdukes', 90), (3, 'South Hampton Seagulls', 80);
SELECT g.team, g.points, rank() OVER (ORDER BY g.points DESC) AS rank FROM games AS g JOIN teams AS t ON g.team = t.team;
SELECT player, salary, dense_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY position ORDER BY salary DESC) AS dense_rank FROM salaries;
SELECT s.player, s.salary, s.position, r.rank FROM (SELECT player, salary, position, rank() OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) AS rank FROM salaries) AS r WHERE r.rank <= 3;
